files.notes: This file contains multiple lesson sections from the Guide Lessons department. Lesson I is a complete theology lesson about Jacob and Rachel with questions and Bible readings. Lesson II appears to be just a title/header. Lesson III contains substantial content on place names, poetry for children, and home economics. There's also a small advertisement at the end.

files.notes: This file contains two distinct lesson sections: first a genealogy lesson on place names and surnames, then a literature lesson on poetry for children. The split occurs at the clear 'LITERATURE' heading that begins the second section.
